description: An intermodal terminal manager needs to ensure there are enough available chassis (the trailer frames that hold containers) for upcoming train arrivals.

nodes.task_description: Check the number of inbound containers scheduled to arrive in the next 24 hours.

expected_outcome.value: Manager sees that 200 containers are scheduled to arrive.

nodes.task_description: Check the current on-hand inventory of available chassis at the terminal.

expected_outcome.value: Manager sees there are only 150 available chassis.
The system highlights the upcoming shortage.

nodes.task_description: Contact a chassis pool provider to order an additional 50 chassis to be delivered to the terminal.

expected_outcome.value: More chassis are ordered to meet the anticipated demand, preventing delays.
